name: BB:UBA : SSH Session Opened
bb_references: BB:UBA : SSH Session Opened on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.SSH Opened, Authentication.SSH Session Started
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : SSH Session Opened on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.SSH Opened, Authentication.SSH Session Started
